data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Ensure data security through encryption as data is sent or stored.
data.technical_spec: Implement TLS for data in transit and AES for data at rest.

data.title: Zero Trust Architecture
data.description: Adopt a zero trust model, assuming breaches will occur and validating every connection.
data.technical_spec: Use identity-based network controls and continuous user verification.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conduct regular security assessments and penetration tests.
data.technical_spec: Employ third-party security experts to audit systems bi-annually.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Strengthen authentication mechanisms by using multiple verification methods.
data.technical_spec: Implement MFA across all critical systems and platforms.

data.title: Incident Response Plan
data.description: Develop a comprehensive plan to address and mitigate security breaches.
data.technical_spec: Define clear protocols and a communication strategy for crisis scenarios.
